description_long: This is a traditional shovel with a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a wide, flat metal blade. The handle features visible calligraphy or decorative script, adding a unique visual element. The blade is broad and tapers slightly towards the bottom, with a rectangular profile and a flat edge suitable for scooping or scraping. The metal blade appears to be securely fastened to the handle, and there is a small rectangular label or plaque affixed to the upper part of the blade. The surface of the blade shows a matte, slightly rough finish, and the handle has a natural wood grain with a smooth texture. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for heavy-duty urban or garden tasks.
description: A sturdy shovel with a curved wooden handle featuring calligraphy and a wide, flat metal blade with a label. The design is both functional and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat blade with a rectangular label and the straight-on handle alignment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wooden handle with visible calligraphy and the blade's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's curve and additional calligraphy details.
attribute_handle_type: Curved ergonomic wooden handle with visible calligraphy; smooth finish.
attribute_blade_type: Wide, flat, rectangular steel blade with a straight edge and slight taper.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular label or plaque is visible on the front upper part of the blade, containing text and possibly an image.
